name: Untitled Horror Game [Discontinued Play Douc R Instead]

reviews.review_description:
I made so much memories with the game but until I saw it having a new name and new game I quit because it’s not how it was like before

This new version is buggy and the old one had many power ups and only up which was fun and the many Easter eggs, just please add back the old update

I like your game even more than gorilla tag I am a trusted user and my name in the game is H I am asking this question since I know your developer team will be nice about it. May I please have moderator please either respond to me or just do whatever I just wanna make sure I know whether I’m getting it or not
I want mod I could keep ur game safe
Sorry for the dev who saw my last review 😞🙁

developer_response.body: Hey man it’s alr. I understand the confusion

reviews.review_title: IAP works but doesn’t give you currency
reviews.review_description: So only buy it if you want to support the developers

reviews.review_title: The problems I have with this game..
reviews.review_description:
#1, The bounce: I HATE this bounce that happens almost every second, I wanted the Pee Cosmetic but the rope to climb up is to bouncy, luckily I made it, and then this stupid tree. The bounce was Crazy (⊙_◎), It was so crazy that I jumped forward and it push me backwards. I got the Pee Cosmetic, but almost threw my headset at the ground. #2 The Cost: I HATE these Price's, they are so expensive. $20 for Long Arms🤨 $20 Also for Ghost Chimp🤨 and $6 more for Fast-Mo🤨 THAT'S LITERALLY $46 THAT I HAVE TO SPEND!?!?!? #3 New Players need to get chimp coin to get another skin: Imagine this, you start playing the game not knowing anything. You have a bad skin that you really want to change it, you ask the person. He said "It's right here!" But you realize it costs chimp coins, so now you either have to spend money on the game, Or wait alot just for a stupid skin.. 


I rate this game a 2/5.

No kick hammer etc
